title: Tholudur Madhurantaka Choleswarar
tagline: Tholudur Madhurantaka Choleswarar — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tholudur Madhurantaka Choleswarar Temple (மதுராந்தக சோளீஸ்வரர் கோவில்) is a temple for the Hindu deity Shiva in Tholudur, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Ramanatham
topPlaces.description: Ramanatham and Tholudur or Thozhudur, (meaning "Distant Village"), are twin towns by the Vellar River in Cuddalore District, Tamil Nadu, India. Ramanatham has schools and a post office.

topPlaces.name: Tholudur
topPlaces.description: Thozhudur, (meaning "village of worshipVellar River in Cuddalore District, Tamil Nadu, India. Thozhudur is well served by government institutions like schools, post office, etc.

topPlaces.name: Arangur
topPlaces.description: Arangur (அரங்கூர்) is a village panchayat in Tittakudi taluk, Cuddalore district.

topPlaces.name: Labbaikudikadu
topPlaces.description: Labbaikudikadu is a town located in the northeastern part of Perambalur district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is classified as an urban area.

topPlaces.name: Ogalur
topPlaces.description: Ogalur is a village in Perambalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It was formerly in Tiruchirappalli district.

topPlaces.name: Perumathur
topPlaces.description: Perumathur is a village in India. It is located in the Kunnam taluk of the Perambalur district in the state of Tamil Nadu, approximately 233 kilometres (145 mi) from the state capital of Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Namaiyur
topPlaces.description: Namaiyur is a small village part of Kunnam Taluk, Perambalur, Tamil Nadu, India. The nearby places are Trichy and Ariyalur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tholudur Madhurantaka Choleswarar?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tholudur Madhurantaka Choleswarar is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tholudur Madhurantaka Choleswarar?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (78 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (76 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tholudur Madhurantaka Choleswarar?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tholudur Madhurantaka Choleswarar at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tholudur Madhurantaka Choleswarar?
faq.a: Stays in Tholudur Madhurantaka Choleswarar start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tholudur Madhurantaka Choleswarar?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ramanatham, Tholudur, Arangur, Labbaikudikadu, Ogalur.
